title: LightBlockRemove
description: Automatically remove player-placed blocks with countdown holograms
body:
# LightBlockRemove
**Light and Effective Block Removal Plugin for Minecraft Servers**

LightBlockRemove is a simple and lightweight plugin that automatically removes blocks after a set time on Minecraft servers. This plugin is ideal for PvP, minigame, or parkour servers where block cleanup is necessary. With countdown holograms displayed above blocks, users can easily track when blocks will be removed.

**Features:**

- **Automatic Block Removal:** Blocks are automatically removed after the configured time.

- **Countdown Holograms:** Holograms above blocks show the remaining time.

- **Block Blacklist:** Prevent specific blocks from being removed via the config file.

- **Player Disabling:** Disable the block removal feature for specific players

- **World Blacklist:** Disable block removal in specific worlds

- **Player Toggle System:** Players can enable/disable block removal for themselves anytime

- **Lightweight and Optimized:** Minimal impact on server performance.

- **Customizable Messages: Customize hologram text and colors.**
#
**Why LightBlockRemove?**
- **Performance-Friendly:** Uses minimal server resources.

- **Flexible Configuration:** Easily customizable through the config file.

- **User-Friendly:** Holograms make it easy for users to know when blocks will be removed.

#

LightBlockRemove is an essential plugin that simplifies block management and enhances user experience on your server. Download now and try it out on your server!
